scripts.build:android: npm run mkdist && react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform android --dev true --bundle-output dist/main.android.jsbundle --assets-dest dist && react-native build-android --extra-params "--no-daemon --console=plain -PreactNativeArchitectures=arm64-v8a"
scripts.build:ios: npm run mkdist && react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform ios --dev true --bundle-output dist/main.ios.jsbundle --assets-dest dist && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace ZebraLinkosExample.xcworkspace -configuration Debug -scheme ZebraLinkosExample -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -sdk iphonesimulator COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO
